facilities.name: Environmental Collection Center

facilities.fees: Many drop-off services are resident-focused and may be free for qualifying Frisco households. Confirm current limits before arrival.

not_accepted: Materials outside posted household program rules

not_accepted: Hazardous waste outside posted program rules
